plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Bug Found: Off-by-One Error in `processItems`

**File:** `src/utils.ts`, line 7

### The Bug
```typescript
// BUGGY — "- 1" causes the loop to stop before the last element
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

For an array of length N, the condition `i < items.length - 1` only lets `i` reach `N - 2`, so the last index (`N - 1`) is **never visited**.

| Input | Buggy output | Expected output |
|---|---|---|
| `["hello", "world", "foo"]` | `["HELLO", "WORLD"]` | `["HELLO", "WORLD", "FOO"]` |
| `["test"]` | `[]` | `["TEST"]` |
| `["a", "b"]` | `["A"]` | `["A", "B"]` |
| `[]` | `[]` | `[]` ✓ |

### The Fix — one character change on line 7
```typescript
// AFTER (correct)
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

Remove `- 1` from the loop condition. That's the **only change needed**.

### Tests
`tests/utils.test.ts` already has 4 tests for `processItems` that expose this bug — no test changes needed. All 6 tests (4 for `processItems` + 2 for `sum`) will pass after the fix.
